scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=dashboard-app.html vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json
scripts.watch: concurrently "cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build --watch" "cross-env INPUT=dashboard-app.html vite build --watch"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run serve
